name: LaZagne
categoryDescription: Commonly abused tools that leave NO Windows registry artifacts. These tools are typically single executables, portable builds, or in-memory frameworks. Detection depends entirely on non-registry evidence: process execution logs, prefetch, ShimCache/Amcache, BAM/DAM, network traffic, and memory forensics. Includes detection notes for each tool.
description: Open-source password recovery tool for browsers, databases, email clients, sysadmin tools, and Windows credential stores. Python-compiled portable binary. No installer, no registry.
forensic_value: No registry artifacts. Flag Python PyInstaller binaries accessing browser databases. LaZagne accesses SQLite files for Chrome/Firefox credentials.
